Rules.Name: ecs-managed-capacity-provider-rule
Rules.EventPattern: {"source":["aws.ec2","aws.autoscaling"],"detail-type":["EC2 Spot Instance Interruption Warning","EC2 Instance-terminate Lifecycle Action","EC2 Instance Launch Successful"],"detail":{"LifecycleHookName":["ecs-managed-draining-termination-hook", {"exists": false}]}}
Rules.Description: An Amazon ECS managed rule that supports capacity provider
